title: Mytocrafted
description: A modpack with the basic mods used by most players on the swedish SMP Mytocraft
body:
Mytocrafted is a modpack bundled with the mods required and most commonly used by players on the Swedish SMP Mytocraft. It also contains configs for some mods to adjust them for the server.

Mytocrafted can also be used for your own server with friends, as it includes mainly basic performance mods. The other mods include:
- **Armor Poser** to easily make cool looking things using armor stands
- **Status** to make sure you are not disturbing your friends
- **Simple Voice Chat** to be able to communicate in-game
- **Xaeros world Map** adjusted to disable cave mode for easier navigation
- **Axiom** for building in creative mode
- **Freecam** for viewing your builds from different perspectives
